texto: one wonders how much real conversation there is when one party does not, in many districts, have to contend for the votes of minorities, and the other can only elevate minorities into positions of power when the political wind is blowing in its direction.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Garrance Franke-Ruta sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “one wonders how much real conversation there is when one party does not, in many districts, have …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, conversation, segregation, útil em momentos de termino e segregation.
